controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - climate finance and management of climate change risks) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking
Financial Companies - Climate Finance and Management of Climate Change Risks)
Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - climate finance and management of climate change risks) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force with immediate effect
controls.control_description: These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force with immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to the following non-banking financial companies (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'nbfcs' and individually as 'an nbfc'): (1) de
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to the following Non-Banking Financial
Companies (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'NBFCs' and individually as 'an
NBFC'):
(1) Deposit-taking NBFCs (NBFC-D) registered with the RBI under the
provisions of the RBI Act, 1934;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to the following non-banking financial companies (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'nbfcs' and individually as 'an nbfc'): (1) de

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'green activities / projects' means activities / projects meeting the requirements prescribed in paragra
controls.control_description:
In these directions, unless the context states otherwise, the terms herein shall
bear the meanings assigned to them below:
(1) 'green activities / projects' means activities / projects meeting the
requirements prescribed in paragraph 13 of these Directions;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'green activities / projects' means activities / projects meeting the requirements prescribed in paragra

controls.control_objective: To ensure an interest-bearing deposit, received by an nbfc for a fixed period and the proceeds of which are earmarked for allocation towards green finance
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an interest-bearing deposit, received by an nbfc for a fixed period and the proceeds of which are earmarked for allocation towards green finance

controls.control_objective: To ensure lending to and / or investing in green activities / projects meeting the requirements prescribed in paragraph 13 of these directions
controls.control_description:
(3) 'green finance' means lending to and / or investing in green activities /
projects meeting the requirements prescribed in paragraph 13 of these
Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to lending to and / or investing in green activities / projects meeting the requirements prescribed in paragraph 13 of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place comprehensive board-approved policies on green deposits and financing framework, the coverage of which are indicated in paragraph 8 and p
controls.control_description:
An NBFC desirous of raising green deposits shall put in place comprehensive
Board-approved policies on Green Deposits and Financing Framework, the coverage
of which are indicated in paragraph 8 and paragraph 10 respectively of these
Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place comprehensive board-approved policies on green deposits and financing framework, the coverage of which are indicated in paragraph 8 and p

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for reviewing the nbfc's green deposit initiatives through a review report to be placed in accordance with the provisions specified in
controls.control_description:
The Board shall be responsible for reviewing the NBFC's green deposit
initiatives through a review report to be placed in accordance with the provisions
specified in paragraph 18 of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to be responsible for reviewing the nbfc's green deposit initiatives through a review report to be placed in accordance with the provisions specified in

controls.control_objective: To ensure lay down all aspects, in detail, for the issuance and allocation of green deposits
controls.control_description:
The Board-approved policy on green deposits of an NBFC shall lay down all
aspects, in detail, for the issuance and allocation of green deposits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to lay down all aspects, in detail, for the issuance and allocation of green deposits

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made available on the website of the nbfc
controls.control_description:
A copy of the
policy on 'Green Deposits' shall be made available on the website of the NBFC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made available on the website of the nbfc

controls.control_objective: To ensure finance any green activities / projects irrespective of raising green deposits for the same
controls.control_description:
An
NBFC may finance any green activities / projects irrespective of raising green
deposits for the same.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to finance any green activities / projects irrespective of raising green deposits for the same

controls.control_objective: To ensure finance green activities / projects first and raise green deposits thereafter for the same
controls.control_description:
However, an NBFC shall not finance green activities / projects
first and raise green deposits thereafter for the same.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to finance green activities / projects first and raise green deposits thereafter for the same

controls.control_objective: To ensure issue green deposits as cumulative / non-cumulative deposits
controls.control_description: An NBFC shall issue green deposits as cumulative / non-cumulative deposits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to issue green deposits as cumulative / non-cumulative deposits

controls.control_objective: To ensure be renewed or withdrawn at the option of the depositor
controls.control_description:
On maturity, the green deposits shall be renewed or withdrawn at the option of the
depositor.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be renewed or withdrawn at the option of the depositor

controls.control_objective: To ensure only be denominated in indian rupees and not in any foreign currency
controls.control_description:
The green deposits shall only be denominated in Indian Rupees and not in
any foreign currency.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to only be denominated in indian rupees and not in any foreign currency

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be applicable to green deposits mutatis mutandis
controls.control_description:
The tenor, size, interest rate, and other terms and conditions
as defined in the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies -
Acceptance of Public Deposits) Directions, 2025, as amended from time to time,
shall also be applicable to green deposits mutatis mutandis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be applicable to green deposits mutatis mutandis

controls.control_objective: To ensure follow the framework prescribed herein
controls.control_description:
Explanation:
(1) It is not mandatory for an NBFC to raise green deposits, but in case it intends
to raise green deposits from their customers they should follow the framework
prescribed herein.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to follow the framework prescribed herein

controls.control_objective: To ensure pay interest on green deposits to its customers as per agreed terms and conditions and aforesaid directions irrespective of allocation / utilisation o
controls.control_description:
(2) An NBFC shall pay interest on green deposits to its customers as per agreed
terms and conditions and aforesaid directions irrespective of allocation /
utilisation of proceeds.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to pay interest on green deposits to its customers as per agreed terms and conditions and aforesaid directions irrespective of allocation / utilisation o

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to the aforesaid directions
controls.control_description:
(3) With respect to premature withdrawal of green deposits, while there is no
restriction, an NBFC shall adhere to the aforesaid directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to the aforesaid directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure have any bearing on the activities / projects undertaken using the proceeds of green deposits
controls.control_description:
Further,
premature withdrawal shall not have any bearing on the activities / projects
undertaken using the proceeds of green deposits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have any bearing on the activities / projects undertaken using the proceeds of green deposits

controls.control_objective: To ensure cover, inter-alia, the following for effective allocation of green deposits: explanation: investment by an nbfc in sovereign green bonds (sgrbs) are c
controls.control_description:
The Board-approved Financing Framework (FF) put in place by an NBFC
shall cover, inter-alia, the following for effective allocation of green deposits:
Explanation: Investment by an NBFC in Sovereign Green Bonds (SGrBs) are
covered under the framework.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to cover, inter-alia, the following for effective allocation of green deposits: explanation: investment by an nbfc in sovereign green bonds (sgrbs) are c

controls.control_objective: To ensure , at the minimum, cover the following aspects:
controls.control_description:
The third-party verification / assurance report shall, at the minimum, cover the
following aspects:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , at the minimum, cover the following aspects:

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The Directions,
instructions, and guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of these Directions shall
continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been
taken, or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or
acknowledgments granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed
by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be
imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in
derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for
the time being in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in
order to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
these Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
<image>
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any
provision of these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding
